drizzle-orm.interface: sqliteTable('policy_templates', { slug: text().primaryKey(), enforcement: text({mode:'json'}), rules: text({mode:'json'}) })

shape.enforcement_array: enforcement = text({ mode: 'json' }) holding an ARRAY (e.g. ["agent","ci"]) — a policy can carry MULTIPLE enforcement values; it MUST read back as Array.isArray (enforcement-is-array), never a scalar
shape.lookup_not_enum: policy_types.slug is a text PK lookup table, NOT a sql enum (lookup-not-enum) — new types extend without a migration
shape.key_api_note: Mirror packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/db/schema.ts. agent_policy.agent_slug is a logical text key (agents live in @adhd/agent-registry). policy_slug FK -> policy_templates.slug is within-package.
Copy packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/db/client.ts. Store tests close + reopen the handle to prove persistence (the enforcement array + override_config + inherited_from must survive the reopen).

zod.interface: z.object({ maxModelCalls: z.number().int().positive().optional() }) -> configSchema; z.infer<typeof configSchema>

shape.configSchema: export const configSchema = z.object({ maxModelCalls: z.number().int().positive().optional() }) — validates the rate-policy limit(s) the enforcement plugin reads from the template rules / per-agent override_config
shape.key_api_note: Mirror packages/ai/agent-mcp-budget/src/index.ts configSchema export exactly — the agent-mcp plugin loader validates plugin config against this schema.

agent-mcp-types-hooks-consumed.interface: import { HookRegistry } from '@adhd/agent-mcp-types'; import type { IHookRegistry, IEnforcementError, Plugin, PluginContext, PluginFactory, PreModelRequestPayload, PostModelResponsePayload, TaskStartPayload } from '@adhd/agent-mcp-types'

shape.IHookRegistry: { register<E extends HookEvent>(event, handler): void ; registerEnforcement<E extends EnforcementEvent>(event, handler): void } — observational register() errors are swallowed; registerEnforcement() handler errors PROPAGATE and fail the task
shape.EnforcementEvent: EnforcementEvent = 'pre:model_request' — the ONLY enforcement event (enforcement-event-pre-model-only). registerEnforcement('pre:model_request', handler) is the single hook that may throw.
shape.IEnforcementError: { isEnforcementError: true; code: string; message: string } — the enforcement plugin throws this (code 'POLICY_VIOLATION') when a rate limit is crossed
shape.HookRegistry: the REAL concrete class — the enforcement-plugin test constructs `new HookRegistry()` (NOT a mock) and asserts `await hooks.enforce('pre:model_request', payload)` REJECTS with isEnforcementError===true once the limit is reached (real-registry-not-mock).
shape.Plugin / PluginFactory / PluginContext: Plugin.install(hooks: IHookRegistry): void ; PluginFactory = (ctx: PluginContext) => Plugin ; PluginContext = { db, config }. Mirror the @adhd/agent-mcp-budget plugin shape.
shape.shared_type_rule: IHookRegistry and the plugin contract live in @adhd/agent-mcp-types per REFERENCES.md:197-211 so @adhd/agent-policy depends on them WITHOUT a circular dep on the orchestrator. No new shared type required for this plan — all consumed symbols already exist in agent-mcp-types/src/{hooks,registry}.ts.
shape.key_api_note: agent-policy DEPENDS ON @adhd/agent-mcp-types only (no plan deps). Its runtime enforcement is an agent-mcp PLUGIN following the @adhd/agent-mcp-budget reference (REFERENCES.md:213-218) — it registers ON agent-mcp's IHookRegistry but does NOT import the agent-mcp orchestrator package (avoids the cycle).

agent-mcp-budget-reference.interface: the canonical plugin pattern: export const configSchema = z.object({...}); class Plugin { install(hooks) { hooks.register(...); hooks.registerEnforcement('pre:model_request', p => this.enforce(p)) } }; const createPlugin: PluginFactory = ({db, config}) => new Plugin(...); export default createPlugin; export { createPlugin }

shape.pattern: @adhd/agent-policy's enforcement plugin MIRRORS this: configSchema (zod) + a Plugin class whose install() registers observational handlers (try/caught) to accumulate per-task counts AND ONE registerEnforcement('pre:model_request', ...) with NO try/catch so the throw propagates.
shape.key_api_note: This is the canonical pattern REFERENCES.md:213-218 names. agent-policy's runtime enforcement exposes itself as a plugin following this reference, NOT a reimplementation. Read-only reference — agent-policy does not modify agent-mcp-budget.

agent-policy-public-api.interface: @adhd/agent-policy exports: { openPolicyDb, schema, PolicyTemplateStore, AgentPolicyStore, configSchema, createPlugin (default + named), seed }

shape.PolicyTemplateStore: new PolicyTemplateStore(db); create(template) ; read(slug) -> {slug, type, description, rules(obj), enforcement(array), version, isSystem} ; list(typeFilter?). Typed errors POLICY_TEMPLATE_NOT_FOUND / POLICY_TEMPLATE_ALREADY_EXISTS. enforcement is a deserialized ARRAY.
shape.AgentPolicyStore: new AgentPolicyStore(db); attach({agentSlug, policySlug, overrideConfig?, isMandatory?}) (direct attach, inherited_from=null) ; attachToCategory({categorySlug, policySlug, isMandatory}) (propagates to all current + future category members) ; listForAgent(agentSlug) -> AgentPolicyAssignment[] (direct + inherited, override_config deserialized). Typed error AGENT_POLICY_ALREADY_ATTACHED.
shape.AgentPolicyAssignment: { agentSlug: string; policySlug: string; overrideConfig: Record<string,unknown>|null; isMandatory: boolean; inheritedFrom: string|null } — SHARED cross-package type (REFERENCES.md:197-211, DATA_MODEL). NEW-SHARED-TYPE: AgentPolicyAssignment should be ADDED to @adhd/agent-mcp-types/src/domain.ts (additive) so the compiler (plan 5) consumes the same shape when folding policies into the compiled header; tracked in agent-compiler/interfaces.json.
shape.enforcement_plugin: configSchema + createPlugin (default + named) — the agent-mcp plugin exposing runtime rate-policy enforcement; registers a throwing handler on hooks.registerEnforcement('pre:model_request', ...).
shape.seed: seed(db) — idempotent seeder for policy_types + the core policy_templates (no-credentials, sox-audit-trail, reviewer-posture, max-rework-3) from SEED_DATA.md.
shape.key_api_note: agent-policy DEPENDS ON @adhd/agent-mcp-types (IHookRegistry + plugin contract) and NO other plan. It is consumed by: @adhd/agent-compiler (plan 5) which reads PolicyTemplateStore + AgentPolicyStore.listForAgent to fold policy constraints into the compiled header at COMPILE time; the migration (plan 7) which writes AGENT_POLICY rows; and @adhd/agent-mcp (plan 6) which loads the enforcement plugin and whose PolicyEngine reads template rate/permission limits at RUNTIME.
